vision_report.compositional_truth_check: The registry identifies P1, P2, P3, and P4. Visual analysis confirms P3 (Pothos with rabbit) and a central black pot containing a single, struggling vine (likely P4/Silver Guest). P1 (Yellow pot) appears to be empty soil, indicating a Systemic Loss. P2 is not visually distinct from the P4 container.

inventory_reconciliation.P2: Systemic Loss (Not identified as distinct from P4)

plant_audit.P1: No biological activity detected. Soil surface appears undisturbed.
plant_audit.P3: Pothos remains stable; rabbit anchor is in position. Leaf health appears consistent.
plant_audit.P4: Single vine shows signs of extreme stress; minimal turgor pressure observed.

biome_observations.soil_texture: Consistently dark and damp across all visible pots.
biome_observations.anomalies: Presence of crushed eggshells in the P4 pot (New Intervention). A small electronic component (IC/chip) was present in earlier frames but has been removed in the current frame.

temporal_deltas.T-5_to_T-3: Stable; no significant change in plant posture or soil composition.
temporal_deltas.T-2: Lighting anomaly (low light/underexposure) makes detailed assessment difficult.
temporal_deltas.T-1_to_CURRENT: Removal of the electronic component from the desk surface. The P4 vine shows slight postural shift, likely due to gravity or minor dehydration.

vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome is in a state of decline. P1 and P2 are effectively lost. P4 is in a precarious state of survival. P3 is the only stable specimen.
anomalies: Crushed eggshells in P4 (likely calcium supplementation attempt)
Removal of electronic component from desk surface
Systemic loss of P1 and P2
vision_report.narrative_description: The botanical environment is currently under-populated. The yellow pot (P1) is devoid of life. The Pothos (P3) remains the anchor of the biome. The most concerning element is the singular vine in the black pot (P4), which shows minimal vitality. The intervention of eggshells suggests an attempt to remediate soil quality, though no immediate recovery is visible.
